allowance.name: Allowance
allowance.desc: Grants a bonus $100 when completeing a challenge

azure_perfection.name: Azure Perfection
azure_perfection.desc: Blue dice ALWAYS count as used - no penalties, only multipliers!

blue_slime.name: Blue Slime
blue_slime.desc: Doubles the chance of rolling blue dice

bonus_money.name: Bonus Money
bonus_money.desc: +$50 for each bonus achieved (Upper Section Bonus or Yahtzee Bonus)

challenge_easer.name: Challenge Easer
challenge_easer.desc: All challenge score targets reduced by 20%

chance520.name: Chance 520
chance520.desc: +5 to all scores for each Chance category scored with 20 or above

chore_champion.name: Chore Champion
chore_champion.desc: Chores are 2x more effective (Check to make sure since refactor)

chore_sprint.name: Chore Sprint
chore_sprint.desc: Chores reduce goof-off meter by 30 instead of 20 (redundant)

consumable_cash.name: Cash Flow
consumable_cash.desc: Grants 1 dollar per turn, +1 dollar per turn for every Consumable used

consumable_collector.name: Consumable Collector
consumable_collector.desc: +0.1x score multiplier for each consumable used

dice_diversity.name: Dice Diversity
dice_diversity.desc: +$5 for each unique dice value rolled upon scoring

different_straights.name: Different Straights
different_straights.desc: Straights can have one gap of 1

evens_no_odds.name: Evens No Odds
evens_no_odds.desc: Even dice add +1, odd dice add -1 to all scores

failed_money.name: Failed Money
failed_money.desc: +$50 for each failed hand (at round end)

foursome.name: Foursome
foursome.desc: If a 4 is scored, there is a 1:4 chance to multiply your score by 4

full_house_bonus.name: Full House Fortune
full_house_bonus.desc: +$25 for each full house rolled (scaling with total rolled this game)

green_slime.name: Green Slime
green_slime.desc: Doubles the chance of rolling green dice

green_monster.name: Green Monster
green_monster.desc: +0.05x green money multiplier per green dice scored. Stacks throughout the game! (Verify It works)

highlighted_score.name: Highlighted Score
highlighted_score.desc: Highlights a random unscored category for 1.5x score

melting_dice.name: Melting Dice
melting_dice.desc: Starts +80 additive, melts by 8 each score

mod_money.name: Mod Money
mod_money.desc: Earn $8 per modded die when scoring

modded_dice_mastery.name: Modded Dice Mastery
modded_dice_mastery.desc: +10 points per modded die when scoring

money_multiplier.name: Money Multiplier
money_multiplier.desc: Immediately multiple your cash for every Yahtzee rolled (increases +.1 each Yahtzee)

money_well_spent.name: Money Well Spent
money_well_spent.desc: +1 to all scores per $50 spent (during the game)

perfect_strangers.name: Perfect Strangers
perfect_strangers.desc: When scoring CHANCE, gain a random 1.1x-1.5x multiplier for that score

pin_head.name: Pin Head
pin_head.desc: When scoring, picks a random dice value as multiplier

plus_thelast.name: Plus The Last
plus_thelast.desc: Adds last score to current score

purple_payout.name: Purple Payout
purple_payout.desc: Each purple die grants $25 when scoring

purple_slime.name: Purple Slime
purple_slime.desc: Doubles the chance of rolling purple dice

rainbow_surge.name: Rainbow Surge
rainbow_surge.desc: 2.0x score multiplier when 5 different dice colors are present!

random_card_level.name: Random Card Level
random_card_level.desc: 20% chance each turn to level up a random scorecard category

randomizer.name: Chaos Dice
randomizer.desc: Each turn applies a random score modifier: 80% chance for additive bonus (-20 to +50), 20% chance for multiplier (Ã—-1 to Ã—4)

red_power_ranger.name: Red Power Ranger
red_power_ranger.desc: Gain +1 additive score for each red dice scored. The additive is cumulative and applies to all future scores.

red_slime.name: Red Slime
red_slime.desc: Doubles the chance of rolling red dice

roll_efficiency.name: Roll Efficiency
roll_efficiency.desc: +N to all scores (N = rolls used this turn)

shop_rerolls.name: Shop Rerolls
shop_rerolls.desc: Shop rerolls always cost $25 - never increases unless sold

straight_triplet_master.name: Straight Triplet Master
straight_triplet_master.desc: Score straights in Lg Straight, Sm Straight, AND Chance in 1 round for +$150 and +75pts

sweet_sixteen.name: Sweet Sixteen
sweet_sixteen.desc: Grants $16 per turn. Score above 0 on turn 16 for a $256 bonus!

tango_and_cash.name: Tango & Cash
tango_and_cash.desc: +$10 for every odd die scored (at round end)

the_consumer_is_always_right.name: The Consumer is Always Right
the_consumer_is_always_right.desc: Score multiplier increases by 0.25x for each consumable used this session

the_piggy_bank.name: The Piggy Bank
the_piggy_bank.desc: Saves $3 per roll. Sell to cash out all savings!

the_replicator.name: The Replicator
the_replicator.desc: After 1 turn, duplicates a random PowerUp you own

upper_bonus_mult.name: Bonus Mult
upper_bonus_mult.desc: Increases score multiplier by 1x for each Upper Section Bonus achieved

wild_dots.name: Wild Dots
wild_dots.desc: For each locked dice of the same number, additional rolled dice have an increased odds of rolling the same number.

yahtzee_bonus_mult.name: Yahtzee Mult
yahtzee_bonus_mult.desc: Increases score multiplier by 1x for each Yahtzee Bonus achieved

yahtzeed_dice.name: Yahtzeed Dice
yahtzeed_dice.desc: Gain +1 die every time you roll a Yahtzee! (Excluding Bonus Yahtzees)
